nasb.text: I will make Rabbah a pasture for camels and the sons of Ammon a resting place for flocks. Thus you will know that I am the Lord.”

esv.text: I will make Rabbah a pasture for camels and Ammon  a fold for flocks. Then you will know that I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必使拉巴成為牧放駱駝的地方，使亞捫人之地成為羊群躺臥之處。你們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 我要使拉巴成为骆驼的草场，使亚扪人的土地变成羊群歇息之处，这样你们便知道我是耶和华。
